title: redundant 'as u32' cast on TssError::get() return value
description: wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs:131: 'e.get() as u32' — TssError::get() already returns u32 (see tpm-rs/errors/src/lib.rs: 'pub const fn get(self) -> u32'). The cast is a no-op. Clippy will flag this as a redundant_cast. Fix: 'Error::TpmLayer { rc: e.get() }'.
